cardPlayed.name: Void Rush
cardPlayed.text: Reveal the top 2 cards of your Main Deck. You may play one of them, reducing its cost by :rb_energy_2:. Draw any you did not play this way.

cardPlayed.name: Cannon Barrage
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Deal 2 to all enemy units in combat.

cardPlayed.name: Bellows Breath
cardPlayed.text:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
[Repeat] :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_mind: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Deal 1 to up to three units at the same location.

cardPlayed.name: Singularity
cardPlayed.text: Deal 6 to each of up to two units.

cardPlayed.name: Unyielding Spirit
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction]_ (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)_
Prevent all spell and ability damage this turn.

cardPlayed.name: Promising Future
cardPlayed.text: Each player looks at the top 5 cards of their Main Deck, chooses one, then recycles the rest. Starting with the next player, each player plays those cards, ignoring Energy costs. (They must still pay Power costs.).

cardPlayed.name: Counter Strike
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Choose a unit. The next time that unit would be dealt damage this turn, prevent it. Draw 1.

cardPlayed.name: Production Surge
cardPlayed.text:
This costs :rb_energy_2: less if you control a Mech.
Play a 3 :rb_might: Mech unit token to your base.
Draw 1.

cardPlayed.name: Not So Fast
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Counter an enemy spell or ability that chooses a friendly unit or gear.

cardPlayed.name: Disintegrate
cardPlayed.text:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Deal 3 to a unit at a battlefield. If this kills it, draw 1.

cardPlayed.name: Fading Memories
cardPlayed.text: Give a unit at a battlefield or a gear [Temporary]. (Kill it at the start of its controller's Beginning Phase, before scoring.).

cardPlayed.name: Defy
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Counter a spell that costs no more than :rb_energy_4: and no more than :rb_rune_rainbow:.

cardPlayed.name: Here to Help
cardPlayed.text:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
You may play a unit from hand to a battlefield you control, reducing its cost by :rb_energy_3:.

cardPlayed.name: Divine Judgment
cardPlayed.text: Each player chooses 2 units, 2 gear, 2 runes, and 2 cards in their hands. Recycle the rest.

cardPlayed.name: Called Shot
cardPlayed.text:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
[Repeat] :rb_rune_chaos: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Look at the top 2 cards of your Main Deck. Draw one and recycle the other.

cardPlayed.name: Arise!
cardPlayed.text: Play a 2 :rb_might: Sand Soldier unit token for each Equipment you control. Then ready two of them.

cardPlayed.name: Singularity
cardPlayed.text: Deal 6 to each of up to two units.

cardPlayed.name: Consult the Past
cardPlayed.text:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Draw 2.

cardPlayed.name: Acceptable Losses
cardPlayed.text:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Each player kills one of their gear.

cardPlayed.name: Void Rush
cardPlayed.text: Reveal the top 2 cards of your Main Deck. You may play one of them, reducing its cost by :rb_energy_2:. Draw any you did not play this way.

cardPlayed.name: Stacked Deck
cardPlayed.text:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Look at the top 3 cards of your Main Deck. Put 1 into your hand and recycle the rest.

cardPlayed.name: Invert Timelines
cardPlayed.text: Each player discards their hand, then draws 4.

cardPlayed.name: Here to Help
cardPlayed.text:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
You may play a unit from hand to a battlefield you control, reducing its cost by :rb_energy_3:.

cardPlayed.name: Emperor's Divide
cardPlayed.text:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Move any number of friendly units at a battlefield to their base.

cardPlayed.name: Promising Future
cardPlayed.text: Each player looks at the top 5 cards of their Main Deck, chooses one, then recycles the rest. Starting with the next player, each player plays those cards, ignoring Energy costs. (They must still pay Power costs.).

cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Deal 2 to all enemy units in combat.

cardPlayed.name: Consult the Past
cardPlayed.text: HIDDEN (Hide now for [rune] to react with later for [0].) REACTION (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.) Draw 2.

cardPlayed.name: Mobilize
